channel.title: BlackFog
channel.description: AI Security for Data Exfiltration, Shadow AI and Ransomware Prevention

item.title: Shadow AI and Governance: Why Traditional Control Is Failing CISOs
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: Shadow AI and Governance: Why traditional controls are failing CISOs as AI adoption accelerates, increasing risk and reducing visibility.

item.title: Oracle Breach: What Happened and Why It Matters
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: The 2025 Oracle breach exposed millions of records across three separate incidents. Learn how attackers got in, which industries were hit, and how to protect your organization.

item.title: What Is An Integrity Data Breach?
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Find out what an integrity data breach involves, how it differs from data loss and why it's vital for businesses to be aware of the potential risks.

item.title: How Quickly Should A Suspected Data Breach Be Reported?
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Data breach reporting deadlines can be tight. Learn when firms must report a suspected data breach, who must be informed and the risks of delay.

item.title: What Are The 5 Most Common Sources Of Data Leaks On The Internet?
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Understanding how these five common sources of data leaks occur and how they can be prevented is an essential part of a data security strategy.

item.title: What Are The Latest Major Data Breaches And What Was Leaked?
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: These ten major data breaches from 2025 highlight the worldwide scale of cybersecurity incidents in the past year.

item.title: How Can A Company Develop An Effective Data Breach Response Plan?
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Learn how to build an effective data breach response plan with clear roles, rapid detection, containment procedures and tested communication protocols.

item.title: What Are The Essential Steps To Take Immediately After A Data Breach?
item.dc:creator: Brenda Robb
item.description: Follow these key steps in the immediate aftermath of discovering a data breach to minimize the chances of severe damage.

item.title: 5 Recent Examples of Security Breach Incidents And What Businesses Must Learn From Them
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: What can businesses take from five of last year's biggest data breaches to ensure they don't become the next victim?

item.title: 6 Hidden Consequences Of Data Breach Incidents Businesses Must Prepare For
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: The consequences of data breach incidents go far beyond immediate financial losses. Make sure you're aware of these six costly ongoing issues.

item.title: Key Things Businesses Must Know About Data Breach Compensation
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: Data breach compensation explained: when customers can claim, the risks to businesses and how to reduce legal exposure.

item.title: Essential Lessons Businesses Should Learn From The NPD Breach
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Harpur
item.description: Learn what happened in the NPD breach, what data was exposed and the key lessons businesses should take to reduce the risk of a similar incident.
